allOf.title: androidCompliancePolicy

deviceThreatProtectionEnabled.description: Require that devices have enabled device threat protection.

passwordExpirationDays.description: Number of days before the password expires. Valid values 1 to 365

passwordMinimumLength.description: Minimum password length. Valid values 4 to 16

passwordMinutesOfInactivityBeforeLock.description: Minutes of inactivity before a password is required.

passwordPreviousPasswordBlockCount.description: Number of previous passwords to block. Valid values 1 to 24

passwordRequired.description: Require a password to unlock device.

securityBlockJailbrokenDevices.description: Indicates the device should not be rooted. When TRUE, if the device is detected as rooted it will be reported non-compliant. When FALSE, the device is not reported as non-compliant regardless of device rooted state. Default is FALSE.

securityDisableUsbDebugging.description: Disable USB debugging on Android devices.

securityPreventInstallAppsFromUnknownSou.description: Require that devices disallow installation of apps from unknown sources.

securityRequireCompanyPortalAppIntegrity.description: Require the device to pass the Company Portal client app runtime integrity check.

securityRequireGooglePlayServices.description: Require Google Play Services to be installed and enabled on the device.

securityRequireSafetyNetAttestationBasic.description: Require the device to pass the SafetyNet basic integrity check.

securityRequireSafetyNetAttestationCerti.description: Require the device to pass the SafetyNet certified device check.

securityRequireUpToDateSecurityProviders.description: Require the device to have up to date security providers. The device will require Google Play Services to be enabled and up to date.

securityRequireVerifyApps.description: Require the Android Verify apps feature is turned on.

allOf.description: This class contains compliance settings for Android.
